ui_changes: schema-driven theme application added to ui.py
list and detail panes styled from ui_schema theme tokens
status line added to actions panel
settings_changes: app title marked as patched working copy

known_limitations: The copied .stamper_lock.json still references generated files in the base app directory.
verify on the working copy therefore validates the base-generated file paths rather than the transformed working files.
A real stamp->patch pipeline needs a transform lock or a lockfile rewrite step after patch application.
Top-level insertions with the tokenizing patcher should use use_patch_indent=true or a dedicated top-level repair hunk when inserting after indented blocks.
